Class AsyncPutBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
dev.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncPutBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class AsyncPutBuilder<T> extends Object
Async fluent builder for putting (inserting or replacing) an item in a DynamoDB table, with an optional condition expression. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T>
    condition(@Nullable ConditionExpression condition)
    Configures a condition expression that gates the put operation.
    @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T>
    condition(@NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> configurator)
    Configures a condition expression that gates the put operation.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    execute()
    Executes the put operation.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Optional<T>>
    executeReturning()
    Executes the put operation and returns the previous item if returnValues(ReturnValue) was set to ALL_OLD.
    @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T>
    onlyIfNotExists(@NonNull String attribute)
    Adds a condition that the specified attribute must not already exist on an item with the same key for the put to succeed.
    @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T>
    returnValues(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnValue returnValues)
    Configures which item attributes to return after the put.

  • Method Details

    • condition

      public @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T> condition(@NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> configurator)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the put operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before writing the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      configurator - a consumer to build the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T> condition(@Nullable ConditionExpression condition)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the put operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before writing the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      condition - the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • onlyIfNotExists

      public @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T> onlyIfNotExists(@NonNull String attribute)
      Adds a condition that the specified attribute must not already exist on an item with the same key for the put to succeed.
      Parameters:
      attribute - the attribute name to check for absence
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnValues

      public @NonNull AsyncPutBuilder<T> returnValues(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnValue returnValues)
      Configures which item attributes to return after the put.

      When set, uses the low-level PutItemRequest with the specified ReturnValues. Common values: ReturnValue.ALL_OLD (returns the previous item if one existed), ReturnValue.NONE.

      To retrieve the previous item when using ReturnValue#ALL_OLD, use executeReturning() instead of execute().

      Parameters:
      returnValues - the return value setting, or null to use the default
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> execute()
      Executes the put operation.
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture that completes when the item has been put

    • executeReturning

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Optional<T>> executeReturning()
      Executes the put operation and returns the previous item if returnValues(ReturnValue) was set to ALL_OLD.
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the previous item, or empty
